015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l;
018
019import java.io.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
024
025/**
026 * Reference implementation of the public {@link TokenReader} surface for the JSON5L format.
027 *
028 * <p>
029 * Subclasses {@link Json5TokenReader} to inherit the JSON5 dialect relaxations (single-quoted and
030 * bare-identifier strings/field names, trailing commas, missing values, comments) and adds JSONL's
031 * flat top-level sequencing: each line's value is emitted in turn at {@link #getDepth() depth} 0
032 * and {@link #next()} returns {@link TokenType#END_OF_STREAM} only when the input is exhausted.
033 *
034 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
035 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe.
036 *    <li>The cursor is a true O(1)-memory streaming cursor ({@link #isStreaming()} == <jk>true</jk>).
037 * </ul>
038 */
039@SuppressWarnings({
040   "resource" // The cursor's underlying ParserPipe is owned by the caller via try-with-resources on the cursor itself; Eclipse JDT flags the inner pipe as unclosed but that's by design.
041})
042public class Json5lTokenReader extends Json5TokenReader {
043
044   /**
045    * Constructor with default settings.
046    *
047    * @param pipe The parser input pipe to read from.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
048    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying reader.
049    */
050   public Json5lTokenReader(ParserPipe pipe) throws IOException {
051      super(pipe);
052   }
053
054   /**
055    * Constructor used by {@link Json5lParserSession#parseTokens(Object)} to plumb the calling
056    * session through so that {@link #read(Class)} can delegate to the JSON5L databind path.
057    *
058    * @param pipe The parser input pipe.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
059    * @param settings The cursor-level settings.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
060    * @param session The {@link Json5lParserSession} for {@link #read(Class)} delegation, or
061    *    <jk>null</jk> to disable {@code read}.
062    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying reader.
063    */
064   public Json5lTokenReader(ParserPipe pipe, Settings settings, Json5lParserSession session) throws IOException {
065      super(pipe, settings, session);
066   }
067
068   @Override /* JsonTokenReader */
069   protected void afterValue() {
070      // At depth 0, a top-level value just completed and we want the next next() / read() to
071      // consume the next line's value (instead of transitioning to S05_end as plain JSON would).
072      // Inside a container the parent's logic is still correct.
073      if (depth == 0)
074         state = S00_expectValue;
075      else
076         super.afterValue();
077   }
078}
